text: Science has a clearer story about soil horizons than social media does. Soil isn't just dirt; it's a complex ecosystem layered over time. Topsoil, subsoil, and bedrock each play unique roles in supporting life. Scientists identify distinct layers called horizons, rich in nutrients or minerals. These horizons impact everything from plant growth to water filtration. But did you know, these layers can change with climate and human activity? Curious about how soil affects your environment? Like and follow for more!
